name: Robert Merrill
abstract: Robert Merrill (June 4, 1917 – October 23, 2004) was an American operatic baritone and actor, who was also active in the musical theatre circuit. He received the National Medal of Arts in 1993.

about_quotes.speaker: Louis Armstrong
about_quotes.evidence: I was at the Sands I was on the building with Robert Merrill of the opera star we were there three four times and that in the finale he and I did the finale
